purpose: Packaged fallback context for fresh plugin sessions before a local graph database is available.
recommended_first_actions: If the visible dashboard URL has ?project_id=<id>, read aming-claw://project/<id>/context so graph/backlog calls use the user-selected project instead of the default. Legacy ?project=<id> links are accepted as fallback only.
Call graph_query with tool=query_schema before inspecting files; use graph-native discovery before full scans.
Use find_node_by_path, get_node, get_neighbors, degree_summary, high_degree_nodes, function_index, search_structure, and search_semantic before falling back to full repo scans.
If governance is offline, ask the user to run aming-claw start or open the dashboard.

core_surfaces.name: dashboard
core_surfaces.notes: Local UI for project import, graph inspection, operations queue, review queue, backlog, and AI config.

core_surfaces.name: governance-api
core_surfaces.notes: REST API and graph-native query surface used by the dashboard, MCP tools, and plugin sessions.

core_surfaces.name: mcp-plugin
core_surfaces.notes: Stdio MCP bridge exposing tools and resources for Codex/Claude local plugin sessions.

core_surfaces.name: packaging
core_surfaces.notes: Pip package and local plugin assets, including the static dashboard build.

primary: Query graph structure and function indexes
Inspect code through dashboard and MCP graph APIs
